findings.evidence: `rg -n "HilleYosida|BernsteinChafai" code/TauCeti/Analysis/CompletelyMonotone/BernsteinMeasures.lean code/TauCeti/Analysis/CompletelyMonotone/BernsteinTheorem.lean code/TauCeti/Analysis/CompletelyMonotone/LaplaceRepresentation.lean` has no hits; the adapted targets are present as `chafaiRescaled_integral_bernsteinKernel_eq_sub_tendsto_atTop` at BernsteinMeasures.lean:1249 and `integral_bernsteinKernel_sub_laplaceKernel_tendsto_zero_of_mass_bound` at BernsteinMeasures.lean:1419.
findings.fix: Add an explicit reference in this file's References block, or in the affected declaration docs, crediting `HilleYosida/BernsteinChafai.lean` for the adapted formal proof material.
findings.issue: The reference block omits the formal source `HilleYosida/BernsteinChafai.lean` even though the PR description says the Lean proofs of `chafai_identity` and Bernstein-to-Laplace kernel convergence were adapted from it.

summary: The classical and roadmap sources are credited in the new headers, but the formal Hille-Yosida source named by the PR description is still absent from the code attribution.
